description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story brick structure with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light. The building is complemented by a spacious outdoor area that includes a wooden deck with a dining set under a large umbrella, surrounded by potted plants and a tree. Adjacent to the main building is a sleek rectangular swimming pool bordered by palm trees and a tiled patio, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The roof is flat and dark, contrasting with the lighter brick walls and glass elements. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen spaces, as well as a bedroom and bathroom. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with large glass windows, a flat roof, and an outdoor deck and pool area surrounded by greenery. The design features open interiors and a seamless blend of indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main brick facade with large windows, the outdoor deck with dining set, and the flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tree, umbrella-shaded deck, and the pool area with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, tiled patio, and the back of the bungalow with more windows.
description_view_3: Side view showing the deck, umbrella, potted plants, and the flat roof with visible room layouts.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
